scope: wave2 fan-out migration: all 5 legacy-parity read streams (forms, responses, workspaces, themes, images) at capability parity -- responses (previously deferred, needing a per-form_id sub-resource fan-out) is now expressed via streams.json's fan_out dialect (S4 engine mini-wave item 2, docs/migration/conventions.md section 3), no Tier-2 StreamHook needed; the full Typeform API surface (webhooks, workspace/form mutation, etc.) is out of scope until Pass B
